heroHeadline: AI Delivering Measurable Impact in Health, Food Security, Climate & Education
heroSubtitle: From AlphaFold's 214M protein structures to AI flood alerts reaching 460M people — tracking how artificial intelligence drives real outcomes globally since 2020.
footerNote: Data sourced from peer-reviewed journals (Nature, Science, The Lancet), UN agencies (WHO, FAO, WFP, UNESCO), and major technology research outlets. Impact claims require independent validation; contested figures are marked.
